response.original_title: Everything Must Go, The End: King of Nothing
response.overview: A behind the scenes look with writer/director/producer Todd Phillips, Joaquin Phoenix, and Lady Gaga as they discuss filming the final scenes of Joker: Folie à Deux. See how filming in Los Angeles and the Bronx in New York each had their own complications.
response.title: Everything Must Go, The End: King of Nothing
